name: CTA right-side images
semantics: The three approved CTA right-side images, each locked to a specific CTA section background color (Email_Primary_2_column.png→Purple, Email_Primary_column_golf.png→Teal/LPGA-gated, Cake_lockup.png→Periwinkle).

name: IBS-C symptom-icon trio
semantics: Fixed ordered trio of circular green-tinted icons with navy labels: Constipation, Belly Pain, Bloating (left-to-right). All three must appear together, unreordered.
